input.command:
cd /tmp; for id in 2IB5 4KGE 4Q7T 1KFD 5JZL 6AA7 3ADF 5WJ2 3M22 2H5Q 3MGF 5Y01 2VZX 4CQH 1YZW 2CHA 3KZY 1AK4 5P21 1H6R; do
  curl -sS --max-time 25 "https://data.rcsb.org/rest/v1/core/polymer_entity/$id/1" -o "pe_$id.json";
done
echo done; ls -la pe_*.json | head

content.text:
done

input.command:
cd /tmp; python3 - <<'EOF'
import json,glob
for f in sorted(glob.glob('pe_*.json')):
    id=f[3:7]
    try:
        d=json.load(open(f))
    except Exception as e:
        print(id,"ERR",e); continue
    ep=d.get('entity_poly',{})
    seq=ep.get('pdbx_seq_one_letter_code_can','')
    name=d.get('rcsb_polymer_entity',{}).get('pdbx_description','')
    syn=[n['name'] for n in d.get('rcsb_polymer_entity',{}).get('rcsb_macromolecular_names_combined',[])]
    print(f"{id}\tlen={len(seq)}\t{name} | {syn}")
EOF

input.command:
cd /tmp; python3 - <<'EOF'
import json
data=json.load(open('fpbase.json'))
for p in data:
    if p['name'] in ('Clover','mCherry'):
        print(">",p['name'], "pdb",p.get('pdb'))
        print(p['seq'])
        print()
EOF

cd /tmp
Q='{"query":{"type":"terminal","service":"sequence","parameters":{"evalue_cutoff":0.1,"identity_cutoff":0.9,"sequence_type":"protein","value":"QVQLQQSAAELARPGASVKMSCKASGYSFTTYTIHWVKQRPGQGLEWIGYINPSSGYAAYNQNFKDETTLTADPSSSTAYMELNSLTSEDSAVYYCAREKFYGYDYWGQGATLTVSS"}},"return_type":"polymer_entity","request_options":{"paginate":{"start":0,"rows":25},"results_content_type":["experimental"]}}'
curl -sS --max-time 40 -G "https://search.rcsb.org/rcsbsearch/v2/query" --data-urlencode "json=$Q" -o hsearch.json; echo EXIT=$?
python3 -c "import json;d=json.load(open('hsearch.json'));print(d.get('total_count'));[print(r['identifier'],round(r['score'],3)) for r in d.get('result_set',[])[:25]]"

cd /tmp
for id in 7BG1 8RMO; do
 curl -sS --max-time 30 "https://data.rcsb.org/rest/v1/core/entry/$id" -o entry_$id.json
done
python3 - <<'EOF'
import json
for id in ['7BG1','8RMO']:
    d=json.load(open(f'entry_{id}.json'))
    ids=d['rcsb_entry_container_identifiers']['polymer_entity_ids']
    print("====",id, d['struct']['title'][:120])
    for e in ids:
        pe=json.load(open('/dev/stdin')) if False else None
    print(" entities:",ids)
EOF
